title: brachychiton × roseus
intro: Brachychiton × roseus, also known as the Ilar tree, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Brachychiton acerifolius and Brachychiton populneus tree species. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Brachychiton × roseus are attributed to its ability to support heart health, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Brachychiton × roseus is typically prepared in herbal form, and its extracts are used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
